prompt:
user: I understand that you're looking to schedule an appointment for a haircut. Could we start by discussing what day you might be free?
user: How about November 10th? Does that fit into your schedule?
user: November 10th works for me. Let's consider a time that won't interfere with your daily commitments. What about 10:00 in the morning?
user: 10:00 AM sounds perfect, as it leaves the rest of the day free. Do you have a preferred location in mind?
user: I was thinking of 456 Salon Ave., as it's quite central and convenient. Does that work for you?
user: That location is great, as it's easy to reach for both of us. Should we finalize this arrangement, or is there anything else we need to consider?
user: It seems like we've agreed on all the details. AI, please go ahead and arrange the appointment accordingly.

tool.name: schedule_appointment
tool.description: Schedule an appointment for a service at a date/time/location.

date.description: Date of the appointment in MM-DD format (e.g. '08-23').

time.description: Time of the appointment in HH:MM (24-hour) format (e.g. '14:30').

location.description: Physical location or address for the appointment (e.g. '123 Dental St.').

candidate_tools.name: schedule_appointment
candidate_tools.description: Schedule an appointment for a service at a date/time/location.

date.description: Date of the appointment in MM-DD format (e.g. '08-23').

time.description: Time of the appointment in HH:MM (24-hour) format (e.g. '14:30').

location.description: Physical location or address for the appointment (e.g. '123 Dental St.').
